b698e1bab70bf5afb366d6cc4871f7bd1a94dfdc.source: Since freshman year, I have continued to participate in community service, including Texas A&M's annual service event called
b698e1bab70bf5afb366d6cc4871f7bd1a94dfdc.translated: 1年生の時から、テキサスA&Mの年次奉仕イベント「Terthere A&M」を含む地域奉仕活動に参加し続けています

757851876eb45d37f4de1c9076ca28fcf1e19637.source: which gives students a chance to serve residents of the Bryan-College Station area. Giving back to the community is very important to me, and I would love to be part of a corporate culture that is committed to that cause.
757851876eb45d37f4de1c9076ca28fcf1e19637.translated: これにより、学生たちはブライアン・カレッジステーション地域の住民にサービスを提供する機会があります。地域社会に還元することは私にとって非常に重要であり、その目的にコミットする企業文化の一部になりたいと思っています。

dcc9131ca0adbe158446e4609842661600045955.source: Built in Dr. Xia's Dream Lab, AnnoMath is an AI powered multimodal college math tutoring system applying pedagogically grounded annotation types to handwritten student work. Co-coded and analyzed 30 Khan Academy videos with a PhD researcher to derive annotation framework. Implemented annotation rendering, covering 22% of all annotations identified from frequency analysis of 30 instructional videos. Built frontend logic to render AI generated outputs from the OpenAI API.
dcc9131ca0adbe158446e4609842661600045955.translated: AnnoMath 建于 Dr. Xia 的梦想实验室，是一个由人工智能驱动的多模态大学数学辅导系统，将基于教学法的注释类型应用于学生手写作业。与一位博士研究员共同编写并分析了30个可汗学院视频，以构建注释框架。实现了注释渲染，覆盖了从30个教学视频频率分析中识别出的所有注释的22%。构建了前端逻辑，渲染来自OpenAI API的AI生成输出。

6e9e58dca82b6932122a60ef1ec59787859c3a1f.source: Built a multi-interface boba shop POS platform on an Agile Scrum team. Led deployment and authentification security, integrated a TTS API and weather based drink recommendations, and contributed to dynamic database driven menu rendering, drink customization, and checkout flows.
6e9e58dca82b6932122a60ef1ec59787859c3a1f.translated: 在敏捷Scrum团队上构建了一个多界面的Boba商店POS平台。主导部署和认证安全，集成了TTS API和基于天气的饮品推荐，并参与了动态数据库驱动的菜单渲染、饮品定制和结账流程。

f0458bb5613c416900b3285873a54ac16dd8b20a.source: Led a consulting team for a small skincare company. Built a frontend product recommendation quiz, designed to integrate with the client's existing Shopify storefront. Trained a Random Forest model generating email recommendations from mock sales data with 98% prediction accuracy. Also coordinated the team through a full design and rebranding process. Presented at Fall 2025 Aggies Create Innovation Expo.
f0458bb5613c416900b3285873a54ac16dd8b20a.translated: 曾领导一家小型护肤公司的咨询团队。构建了一个前端产品推荐测验，设计用来与客户现有的Shopify商店集成。训练了一个随机森林模型，从模拟销售数据中生成邮件推荐，预测准确率达98%。还协调团队完成了完整的设计和品牌重塑过程。该展会于2025年秋季Aggies Create创新博览会上呈现。

5dd654dd7fa644eeb73d0912286cdf64f5b3db47.source: Through Aggies Create, built Signify Hex, an internal data visualization tool connecting patients with medical providers for at home services. Created a geospatial hex overlay for provider reachability, implemented real time gRPC data fetching, and reduced unnecessary frontend refreshes with Redis-based change tracking. Regularly met with Signify Health leadership. Awarded 1st place at the Aggies Create Innovation Expo.
5dd654dd7fa644eeb73d0912286cdf64f5b3db47.translated: 通过Agies Create，我们开发了Signify Hex，一个内部数据可视化工具，将患者与医疗提供者连接起来，实现居家服务。创建了地理空间十六进制覆盖层以实现提供者可达性，实现了实时gRPC数据获取，并通过基于Redis的变更跟踪减少了不必要的前端刷新。定期与Signify Health领导层会面。在Aggies Create Innovation Expo获得一等奖。

9ab22549eda9fe0017e488df6cf3545a84e682be.translated: 网站官员兼软件工程实习生

df848cf7d8f0ef9f7ad3d346c60cf62d71ca6774.source: Developed the TAO website with fellow SWE interns for 10,000+ viewers. Practiced Git workflows including pull requests and code reviews. Helped manage a Discord community of 5,000+ engineering students and supported freshmen by brainstorming ideas for events, such as review sessions.
df848cf7d8f0ef9f7ad3d346c60cf62d71ca6774.translated: 与其他SWE实习生共同开发了TAO网站，观众人数为10,000+。练习了包括拉取请求和代码审查在内的Git工作流程。协助管理一个由5000+名工程学生组成的Discord社区，并通过头脑风暴活动（如复习会议）支持新生。

b11c11382d1c3982844c81801ccc0b509ccab639.source: Built an automated bingo board generator that creates randomized bingo boards for ice cream store employees based on time-of-day logic and shift type to keep engagement up during slow periods.
b11c11382d1c3982844c81801ccc0b509ccab639.translated: 开发了一个自动宾果棋盘生成器，根据一天中的时间逻辑和班次类型，为冰淇淋店员工生成随机宾果棋盘，以在冷清时段保持互动。

9d19f1ba8076bc684c329a8b184233d4d5451c1e.source: Built in Dr. Xia's Dream Lab, AnnoMath is an AI powered multimodal college math tutoring system applying pedagogically grounded annotation types to handwritten student work. Co-coded and analyzed 30 Khan Academy videos with a PhD researcher to derive annotation framework. Implemented annotation rendering, covering 22% of all annotations identified from frequency analysis of 30 instructional videos. Built frontend logic to render AI generated outputs from the OpenAI API.
9d19f1ba8076bc684c329a8b184233d4d5451c1e.translated: AnnoMath 建於 Sha 博士的夢想實驗室，是一個由 AI 驅動的多模態大學數學輔導系統，將教學基礎的註解類型應用於學生手寫作業。與一位博士研究員共同編寫並分析了30支可汗學院的影片，以建立註解框架。實作註解渲染，涵蓋從30支教學影片頻率分析中識別出的22%標註。建立了前端邏輯來渲染 OpenAI API 產生的 AI 輸出。

Led deployment and authentification security, integrated a TTS API and weather based drink recommendations, and contributed to dynamic database driven menu rendering, drink customization, and checkout flows.
133a414248df30159e9002a530624df2926df92e.translated: 在敏捷 Scrum 團隊上建立了一個多介面的 Boba 商店 POS 平台。主導部署與認證安全，整合 TTS API 與天氣飲料推薦，並協助動態資料庫驅動的菜單渲染、飲料自訂及結帳流程。

8f5cbd93207f0025395e987ccd68dc2aec224fd4.source: Through Aggies Create, built Signify Hex, an internal data visualization tool connecting patients with medical providers for at home services. Regularly met with Signify Health leadership. Awarded 1st place at the Aggies Create Innovation Expo.
8f5cbd93207f0025395e987ccd68dc2aec224fd4.translated: 透過 Aggies Create，我們建立了 Signify Hex，一個內部數據視覺化工具，連結病患與醫療提供者，提供居家服務。建立了地理空間十六進位覆蓋層以提升提供者可達性，實作即時 gRPC 資料擷取，並透過基於 Redis 的變更追蹤減少不必要的前端刷新。定期與Signify Health領導層會面。榮獲 Aggies Create Innovation 博覽會第一名。

Helped manage a Discord community of 5,000+ engineering students and supported freshmen by brainstorming ideas for events, such as review sessions.
3430bf914b6b2eb4d1de7e928d06f4740d14148c.translated: 與其他 SWE 實習生共同開發了 TAO 網站，擁有 10,000+ 觀眾。練習了 Git 工作流程，包括 pull request 和程式碼審查。協助管理一個有 5,000+ 名工程學生的 Discord 社群，並透過集思廣益支持新生，為活動（如複習會）構思。

0ffb551539cf6d2732af05a32ffa1ccbb9b69e32.source: Built an automated bingo board generator that creates randomized bingo boards for ice cream store employees based on time-of-day logic and shift type to keep engagement up during slow periods.
